title: hieracium lachenalii subsp. pseudopollichiae
intro: Hieracium lachenalii subsp. pseudopollichiae, commonly known as Hawkweed, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion-like genus Hieracium. This plant is believed to possess medicinal properties, particularly its leaves, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues due to their anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Hieracium lachenalii subsp. pseudopollichiae include reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and acting as an antiseptic to aid in wound healing. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea or using them in tincture form to harness its medicinal properties.
